# Sleep Hygienics - Rx Clinical Pet Blanket

> A clinical-grade, silver-ion antimicrobial dog blanket designed to mitigate environmental allergens, dust mites, and prevent secondary infections in canine hot spots.

## Product Overview
The Rx Clinical Pet Blanket™ acts as a sterile recovery zone for dogs suffering from allergies, atopic dermatitis, and acute moist dermatitis (hot spots). Standard dog beds harbor dust mites and bacteria. This blanket uses sustainable Silver-Ion Antimicrobial Technology to physically destroy E. coli, Staph, Salmonella, and yeast on contact.

## Target Audience
Dog owners, particularly those with allergy-prone breeds (like French Bulldogs and Golden Retrievers), dealing with constant paw licking, itching, and smelly skin.

## Pricing & Sizing
- Small (27" x 36"): $79.99 - Perfect for crates, small beds, or travel.
- Large (36" x 56"): $99.99 - Full coverage for large breeds or couches.
- Shipping: Free shipping included.

## Core Clinical Benefits
1. Mitigates dust mite exposure (the cause of up to 90% of environmental dog allergies).
2. Prevents secondary bacterial infections during hot spot recovery.
3. Neutralizes odor at the source.
4. Withstands 50+ hot washes without losing antimicrobial efficacy.

## Official Links
- Website: https://www.sleephygienicsltd.com
